title: RC4521 Application for a Financial Institution of a Prescribed Class to be Designated as a Qualifying Institution or Revocation of a Previously Granted Designation - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4521 Application for a Financial Institution of a Prescribed Class to be Designated as a Qualifying Institution or Revocation of a Previously Granted Designation

## Notice to the reader
You can submit your request electronically using the “File an election” service in My Business Account or Represent a Client .
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Use this form if you are, or you reasonably expect to be, a financial institution of a prescribed class throughout a particular fiscal year and you want to be designated as a qualifying institution under subsection 141.02(25) of the Excise Tax Act, or you want to revoke a previously granted designation. You have to file this form for each fiscal year that you want to be designated as a qualifying institution.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (rc4521-fill-22e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (rc4521-fill-22e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (rc4521-22e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (rc4521-22e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
